case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS GONZALES ABDON

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES ABDON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES ABDON $701.35 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $742.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO GONZALES ABDON RETURNED, NOT FORWARDABLE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-05-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-26-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
